dialogue_texts: Ugh... I haven't been scorched like this since I was a baby. You are really as persistent as they say.
That was some flashy fire, but it takes more than a few sparks to stop the Queen! I'm heading inside.
Go ahead then... but don't say I didn't warn you.
The glohm inside is much thicker than the smoke from the flames.
Thick air, glohm stench, and moody snakes... This mansion is a real fixer-upper.
I'll be sure to send the Order a bill for the "royal cleaning" service!
You'll be lucky if you even have a kingdom left to rule once the Master is done with you.
The glohm doesn't just isolate; it consumes.
Consumption, eh? Sounds like I'll just have to eat my way to the top then. See ya, snake-lady!
